guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

records.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 44 (Travel Rule) + Art. 89 (two-stage phase-in: domestic by Feb 2027, international by 2 Feb 2028) + Art. 88 (authorisation adjustment period — 270-day adequação; internal controls / cybersecurity / Law 13.810/2019); Res BCB 521/2025 (KYT / self-hosted wallets)
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (PLD/FTP obligations on SPSAVs; ≥3 responsible administrators including AML/CFT; GAFI Recs 15-16 alignment); Lei 14.478/2022

Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 20 (besides SPSAVs, only commercial/exchange/investment/multiple banks, Caixa, CTVM/DTVM and FX brokers may provide intermediation/custody, with restrictions); Art. 4 (SPSAV modalities)

records.instrument: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025; Res BCB 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025) — SPSAV minimum-capital methodology
records.pinpoint: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025 + Res BCB nº 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025): minimum capital R$10,800,000 to R$37,200,000 scaled by the set of activities performed

records.instrument: Res BCB 521/2025 (virtual assets in the FX market); Lei 14.286/2021 (Foreign Exchange Law)
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 521 — per-operation caps (USD 100k SPSAV / USD 500k FX-FI when counterparty not FX-authorised); amends the Res 277/278/279 FX trio, inserting Art. 76-A into Res 277/2022 as the câmbio-inclusion hook (legal base: Lei 14.286/2021)

Res BCB 520/2025 (patrimonial segregation: client funds in individualised payment/deposit accounts; client virtual assets in segregated wallets; foreign-custodian conditions — home-country authorisation/supervision, Brazil representative, enforceable guarantees, formal segregation of Brazilian clients' assets)

records.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof-of-reserves + biennial independent audit + published reports); Res BCB 521/2025 Art. 82-A (monthly BCB reporting); IN BCB 701 (22 Jan 2026)
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof of reserves; periodic audits; transparent information flows); Res BCB 521/2025 (monthly FX-operations reporting from 4 May 2026)

records.instrument: Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation regime); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (provider modalities)
records.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022 (BCB authorisation required to provide virtual-asset services); Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation process); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (three SPSAV modalities: intermediária, custodiante, corretora), Art. 14 (sociedade limitada/anônima; ≥3 administrators; head office in Brazil); authorisation deadline 30 Oct 2026 (270 days)

records.instrument: Res BCB 521/2025 (FX reclassification + caps); Res BCB 561/2026 (eFX exclusion); Lei 14.286/2021
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 521/2025 (amends Res 277/278/279 of 31 Dec 2022): virtual-asset services brought into the FX market — international payments/transfers, stablecoin trades, and payment of expenses abroad treated as câmbio operations; monthly reporting to the BCB from 4 May 2026

records.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 (Marco Legal dos Ativos Virtuais); BCB implementing rulemaking
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (VASPs may not offer credit to clients or raise funds from the public except via share issuance; client virtual assets may not be used for proprietary operations except staking and qualified/professional-investor transactions)

records.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 (Marco Legal dos Ativos Virtuais); Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB as VASP authority; CVM carve-out for securities tokens)
records.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022 arts. 2-9; Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB designated competent authority for virtual-asset services; CVM retains jurisdiction over tokens that are securities)

records.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 — stablecoin definition + asset-curation / listing-policy rules
records.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 2, III (reserve assets of a fiat-referenced token = the fiduciary currency and public debt issued by the same governments); Arts. 64+ (asset curation; algorithmic-stablecoin prohibition; proof of reserves)

records.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 + Decreto 11.563/2023 (CVM carve-out); CVM Parecer de Orientação 40; Resolução CVM 175 (investment funds)
records.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022; Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB over payment/VASP activity; CVM jurisdiction preserved over tokens with securities characteristics)

forward.supervisor_reading: BR has no class-moving or accessibility-changing pending event of its own. Separately, 2 inbound and 4 outbound corridor(s) reclassify when counterparts enact. Most exposed counterpart(s): KR (2), TW (2), UK (1), US (1).
